title: Business Admin Executive (North)
description:
Key Responsibilities:


Strategic Planning:
• Design and execute strategic plans that support the organization’s goals and objectives.

Operational Oversight:
• Supervise daily operations to ensure smooth and efficient functioning across all departments.

Financial Management:
• Oversee budgeting, financial forecasting, and reporting to maintain fiscal responsibility and maximize profitability.

Stakeholder Engagement:
• Develop and nurture relationships with key stakeholders, including clients, vendors, and senior leadership.

Performance Metrics:
• Define and track performance indicators to evaluate organizational effectiveness and highlight areas for improvement.

Project Management:
• Manage major projects from start to finish, ensuring they align with strategic priorities.

Administrative Responsibilities:
• Coordinate schedules, appointments, and communications for senior management.
• Maintain organized, accurate, and confidential files, records, and databases.
• Facilitate communication between departments and serve as a liaison for internal and external interactions.
• Support the creation and enforcement of administrative policies and procedures.
• Monitor inventory levels and handle procurement coordination as necessary.


Requirement:


• Experienced in business administration/ business management/ running own small business/ any relevant

• Proficiency in project management and Office Suites.

• Proven experience in leadership roles with a strong understanding of business operations.

• Excellent analytical and problem-solving skills.

• Strong communication and interpersonal skills.


We regret only shortlisted candidates will be contacted. All applications will be handled confidentially. By submitting your application, you agree to the collection, use, retention, and disclosure of your personal information to prospective employers


Wecruit Pte Ltd

EA License No: 20C0270

postedCompany.description:
Wecruit is one of the leading recruitment firms based in Singapore, dedicated to helping job seekers find the right career opportunities.


We partner with reputable companies across a wide range of industries, including Healthcare, IT, Corporate Support, Engineering, Education, Logistics & Supply Chain, Oil & Gas, and Maritime. 


Whether you're looking for permanent roles or short-term assignments, our consultants take the time to understand your experience, preferences, and goals to match you with suitable roles.

With over 1,000 successful placements and a strong track record of candidate satisfaction, Wecruit is here to support your career journey.


Let us help you take the next step—reach out to explore current opportunities or to speak with our team.
postedCompany.name: WECRUIT PTE. LTD.
